messages: Hi, I just got my home insurance renewal notice and my premium went up 18% to $1,847. That seems really high — can you explain what happened?
Okay, the regional hail data makes sense I guess. But 18% is still a lot. What are my options here?
Tell me more about the deductible option. What would my premium be if I moved to a $2,000 deductible?
Alright, I'll accept the renewal as-is for now. Can you confirm it's locked in?
